    G

    getAttributes() - Method in interface iu.session.SessionDetailAttributes
    Gets a mapping of attribute values.
    getClassName() - Method in interface iu.session.SessionDetailAttributes
    Gets the session detail interface class name.

    getEnc() - Method in interface iu.session.config.IuSessionConfiguration
    Gets the encryption algorithm to use for protecting stored session tokens.
    getExpires() - Method in class iu.session.Session
    Gets session expire time
    getInactiveTtl() - Method in interface iu.session.config.IuSessionConfiguration
    Gets time to live active Duration for store session.
    getJwk() - Method in interface iu.session.config.IuSessionConfiguration
    Gets the key to use for signing and verifying stored session tokens.
    getMaxSessionTtl() - Method in interface iu.session.config.IuSessionConfiguration
    Gets the maximum length of time to allow session to be remain active.
    getResourceUri() - Method in class iu.session.Session
     
    getSessionCookieName() - Method in class iu.session.SessionHandler
    Gets the session cookie name for a protected resource URI

    H

    hashKey(byte[]) - Static method in class iu.session.SessionHandler
    Gets the hash key to use for storing tokenized session data.
